problemStatement: Build a software solution for the assigned Hackathon topic. The system should implement the core user workflow, demonstrate meaningful AI integration, and provide a maintainable codebase with clear documentation.

rubric.name: Tính đúng đắn & Hoàn thiện chức năng
rubric.description: Evaluate whether the submitted source code implements the core features described in the problem statement.
rubric.aiInstruction: Use source code, README, execution results and repository evidence to assess feature completeness. Do not rely only on claims in the README.

rubric.name: Ứng dụng AI trong giải pháp
rubric.description: Evaluate whether AI is functionally integrated into the solution and relevant to the problem.
rubric.aiInstruction: Look for actual AI API usage, model calls, agent workflow, prompt handling or AI-related service logic in the source code.

rubric.name: Thiết kế & Kiến trúc phần mềm
rubric.description: Evaluate modularity, maintainability, structure, readability and separation of concerns.
rubric.aiInstruction: Use source structure, code organization, naming, duplication and maintainability evidence.

rubric.name: Thuyết trình & Demo
rubric.description: Evaluate presentation clarity and live demo quality.
rubric.aiInstruction: Do not assign a score. Human judges evaluate this during the presentation/demo.

rubric.name: Teamwork & Trả lời phản biện
rubric.description: Evaluate teamwork and ability to answer judge questions.
rubric.aiInstruction: Do not assign a score. Human judges or mentors evaluate this criterion.

lint.summary: Lint found duplicated validation logic in two files.

metadata.readmeExcerpt: The project uses an LLM API to generate rubric-based source code review and stores criterion-level AI suggestions.
